metaDesc: Internal status indicators for WPA Journal. No external indexing claims.
title: Journal Metrics
deck: Honest internal indicators of the journal's status — not external citation metrics.
k002: These are internal status indicators for WPA Journal. They describe the journal's current operational state, not external citation performance.
k014: No submission fee in the preparation phase
k018: Being activated gradually; stated per issue or article
k020: Pending / to be listed after official assignment
k022: To be listed after official assignment
k024: Research, case study, analysis, review, working paper, commentary
k026: Traditional external indexing metrics, such as Impact Factor or CiteScore, will be listed only if and when they are officially obtained through relevant external systems.
k027: These are internal WPA indicators and do not represent Scopus, Web of Science or other external indexing metrics.
